title: Connection lost after updating n8n
symptom: After updating n8n, the system reports 'connection lost'. This prevents the user from accessing the n8n interface.
applies_when: Updated n8n to version 1.95.2 or later
root_cause: The issue arises because the updated version of n8n may not be compatible with the previous Docker configuration. Specifically, the image tag needs to be updated to the latest version to ensure proper functionality.
fix_steps: Run the command: docker pull docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:1.97.0
Modify the docker-compose.yml file to set the image to docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:1.97.0
Save the changes to the docker-compose.yml file
Run the command: docker compose up -d
agent_instruction: Update the Docker image and configuration to version 1.97.0 and restart the service.
